channel.title: AIIB Job Vacancies
channel.description: Current job opportunities at Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB)

item.title: 2026 Internship ProgramIntern, Risk Research
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of 2026 Internship ProgramIntern, Risk Research. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 20, 2026.

item.title: 2026 Graduate ProgramInvestment Analyst
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of 2026 Graduate ProgramInvestment Analyst. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 19, 2026.

item.title: Workspace and Facility Management Associate
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Workspace and Facility Management Associate. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 29, 2026.

item.title: Counsel - Private Sector Investment Operations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Counsel - Private Sector Investment Operations. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 29, 2026.

item.title: Advisor on Investment Operations Coordination
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Advisor on Investment Operations Coordination. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 20, 2026.

item.title: Senior Secretariat Officer (Events), Shareholder Relations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Secretariat Officer (Events), Shareholder Relations. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 11, 2026.

item.title: (Senior) Investment Solutions Specialist - Climate
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of (Senior) Investment Solutions Specialist - Climate. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 05, 2026.

item.title: Senior Investment Officer - Financial Institutions - West Asia / Non-Regional Members
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer - Financial Institutions - West Asia / Non-Regional Members. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 08, 2026.
